## Type of Change

- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] perf: Performance improvement
- [ ] docs: Documentation update (Diátaxis compliant)
- [ ] refactor: Code refactoring
- [ ] ci/cd: Automation or pipeline change
- [ ] skill: AI Agent skill update
